nasb.text: The nursing child will play by the hole of the cobra, And the weaned child will put his hand on the viper’s den.

esv.text: The nursing child shall play over the hole of the cobra, and the weaned child shall put his hand on the adder’s den.

cnv.text: 吃奶的嬰兒必在虺蛇的洞口玩耍， 斷奶的孩子必放他的手在毒蛇的穴上。

ccb.text: 吃奶的婴孩在毒蛇的洞口玩耍， 断奶的孩子把手伸进蛇洞。

csbs.text: 吃奶的婴儿在虺蛇的洞口玩耍， 断奶的孩子按手在毒蛇的穴上。
